description: A customer, 'Northstar Industrial Solutions', has requested a partial return for a recent order of safety equipment due to quality issues and sizing errors. Process this return request by issuing a partial credit note and registering the refund payment for the specific items listed in /home/ga/Desktop/return_request.txt. Ensure the credit note is posted and the refund is registered against the existing paid invoice for this customer. Login credentials: admin@example.com / admin (Database: odoo_demo).
